creator: almarrie@gmail.com
text:
On 2/4/07, makc <makc@issp.ac.ru> wrote:
> I can't reproduce this
>
> PID USERNAME    THR PRI NICE   SIZE    RES STATE    TIME   WCPU COMMAND
>  868 root          1  96    0 54364K 37444K select   1:40  0.68% Xorg
> 10037 makc          1  96    0 27016K 22148K select   0:01  0.49% kxgenerator
>
> You can try recompile kxgenerator without CPUTYPE flag.
> And don't forget to backup your xorg.conf before running kxgenerator!
>
> Max.

I rebuilt it with plane make.conf without any tweaks.

kx generator doesn't run, it's still hogging the cpu and nothing happens.
kx generator - ServerLayout Changer display the window and when I
chose the file there, nothing happens at all, and it does disappear.

This is AMD SMP laptop with dual cores

Also PC-BSD wanted to add it to the packages ship with it's CD, but
they can't get it working too.

http://bugs.pcbsd.org/bug.php?op=show&bugid=398&pos=2
